1: And called the earth from the rising of the sun unto the going down thereof.
3: A fire shall devour before him, and it shall be very tempestuous round about him.
4: And to the earth, that he may judge his people.
5: Those that have made a covenant with me by sacrifice.
6: For God is is judge himself. Selah. Selah.
7: O Israel, and I will testify against thee: I am am God, even even thy God.
8: Or thy burnt offerings, to have been to have been continually before me.
9: Nor Nor he goats out of thy folds.
10: And And the cattle upon a thousand hills.
11: And the wild beasts of the field are are mine.
12: For the world is is mine, and the fulness thereof.
13: Or drink the blood of goats?
14: And pay thy vows unto the most High:
15: I will deliver thee, and thou shalt glorify me.
16: What hast thou to do to declare my statutes, or that that thou shouldest take my covenant in thy mouth?
17: And castest my words behind thee.
18: And hast been partaker with adulterers.
20: Thou slanderest thine own mother's son.
21: But But I will reprove thee, and set them them in order before thine eyes.
22: Lest I tear you you in pieces, and there be there be none to deliver.
23: And to him that ordereth his his conversation aright aright will I shew the salvation of God.
